name: Tawata Kanae
exclusiveWeapon: The Path a Hero Must Take

stats.label: Agility
stats.description: Critical Hit Rate and Critical Hit Damage

basic.name: Kitsune
basic.description: Three-stage slash attack dealing Fire elemental damage.

core.name: Uzumaki
core.description: Kanae connects a wire to both her swords, throws them, and then reels them back in. Inflicts Knock Down.

skill.name: Munechika
skill.description: Kanae uses her wires to pull herself forward, adding momentum as she dices up her enemies with quick, consecutive slashes. Final hit causes Airborne. Auto-triggers Extreme Evasion if hit midair.

skill.name: Kamaitachi
skill.description: Kanae duel-wields two swords to quickly cut through her enemies with incredible speed. Inflicts Knock Down.

support.name: Aragoto
support.description: Kanae pummels her enemies with two high-energy, consecutive cross-slashes. Final hit causes Knock Down.

qte.name: Noragami
qte.description: Kanae slices up her enemies with two consecutive cross-slashes while moving forward. Activatable after Extreme Evasion, Core Attack, Ultimate Skill, Stun, or Blind. Inflicts Knock Down.

ultimate.name: Tsuchigumo
ultimate.description: Kanae fires off multiple wires to bind the enemy and then executes a sword technique that cuts the enemy's very lifeline. Final hit causes Knock Down.

passive.name: Instinct
passive.description: Gaining Crimson/Scarlet/Fire effects transforms Kamaitachi into ultimate-level damage. Damage to Break-state targets increases 24%. Three cascading effect types with increasing bonuses.

advancements: Instinct stacking system: 1 stack per enemy death, 5 stacks per Break state. Increases Critical Hit Rate by 1% per stack. At 10 stacks converts to Sixth Sense: +20% Critical Hit Rate, -40% MP consumption below 20% MP.
Munechika grants 5s Super Armor. Fire: Kamaitachi reduces Munechika cooldown 5s. Defense Penetration increases 10%. Ultimate Skill damage increases 100%.
Fire damage increases 12% per Fire team member (max 3 stacks). Guild Boss removes stack limit.
Enhanced Instinct/Sixth Sense effects. Fire teammates gain 5 Instinct stacks upon Ultimate use. Sixth Sense grants +77% Attack, +20% Critical increases, -50% MP reduction at 50% MP or below.

weapon.name: The Path a Hero Must Take
